reviews.review_description: Wow, gosh! I never thought I could play Twisted Dark in VR. My first experience was great! I'm loving playing lying down, it's so comfortable to read.

reviews.review_title: Thriller, Comics in VR, a Winner for me!
reviews.review_description:
This was always going to be a hit for me, being a fan of dark stories, comics and VR I was intrigued.

The pages are clear and easy to read, the environments and interactions bring a great level of immersion, a very cool way to experience a graphic novel.

I won't go into the stories too much, in order to avoid spoilers but they are also great and cleverly connected.

Excited to see any future updates!

As an app it doesn't add much. I wish if there was an option to EQ the music, SFX, and voice over. In many cases I struggle with hearing the introductory voice over. I also wish the environment would change with every chapter. As it stands, it a cool way to read the comic but has a lot of room for more immersiveness
